title: Podcast: What is it actually like to play at a World Cup?
summary: A podcast explores the personal experience of playing at a World Cup competition as Scotland prepare for their return to the tournament, offering insights into what players face at football's biggest stage.
content: We ask what the experience of playing at a World Cup is as Scotland are set to return.

zh.title: 播客：在世界杯上比赛究竟是什么感受？
zh.summary: 一档播客探索了在世界杯比赛中的个人体验，苏格兰为重返这一赛事做准备之际，提供了球员在足球最大舞台上面临的挑战的见解。

title: Celtic hold talks with Keane, plan discussions with O'Neill - gossip
summary: Celtic are holding talks with Keane and planning discussions with O'Neill regarding the managerial position as the club seeks leadership. The moves reflect ongoing speculation around the future of the club's management.
content: Talks continue over future of Celtic manager post as Hibernian midfielder is linked with West Ham.

zh.title: 凯尔特人与基恩进行谈判，计划与奥尼尔进行讨论 - 花边新闻
zh.summary: 凯尔特人与基恩进行谈判，并计划与奥尼尔就主教练职位进行讨论，因为该俱乐部正在寻求领导力。这些举措反映了围绕俱乐部管理层未来的持续猜测。

title: Remembering Scotland's World Cup bogeymen of finals gone by
summary: The article examines Scotland's troubled history at World Cup finals since their first attempt in 1954, highlighting recurring misfortunes and obstacles the team has faced. These historical patterns provide context as Scotland prepares for their next World Cup campaign.
content: Since their first attempt in 1954 there's always been some kind of misfortune lurking in the shadows for Scotland at World Cups, writes Tom English.

zh.title: 回顾苏格兰世界杯历史上的"克星"
zh.summary: 本文审视了苏格兰自1954年首次尝试以来在世界杯决赛中的坎坷历史，强调了该队面临的反复不幸和障碍。这些历史模式为苏格兰为下一届世界杯做准备提供了背景。

title: Chelsea legend Tambling dies aged 84
summary: Bobby Tambling, Chelsea's former record goalscorer with 202 goals for the club, has died at age 84. Tambling's legacy as a Chelsea icon marks the end of an important chapter in the club's history.
content: Chelsea's former record goalscorer Bobby Tambling - who netted 202 goals for the club - dies at the age of 84.

zh.title: 切尔西传奇球星坦布林去世，享年84岁
zh.summary: 切尔西前纪录射手博比·坦布林为该队打进202球，现已去世，享年84岁。坦布林作为切尔西传奇球星的遗产标志着俱乐部历史上一个重要篇章的结束。

title: Video vault and Leeds litter picking - inside the mind of Bielsa
summary: Marcelo Bielsa, the former Leeds United manager widely regarded as having watched more football than perhaps anyone alive, is set to lead Uruguay at the World Cup. The article explores his meticulous approach and unique philosophy to the game.
content: It is possible that nobody alive today has watched more football than Marcelo Bielsa, the former Leeds United boss who will lead Uruguay at the World Cup.

zh.title: 视频库和利兹捡垃圾——比埃尔萨的思维世界
zh.summary: 前利兹联队主管马塞洛·比埃尔萨被广泛认为看过的足球比赛比任何活着的人都多，他即将率领乌拉圭队参加世界杯。该文章探讨了他对这项运动的细致方法和独特哲学。

title: A teen with no desire to be Messi: How Lamine Yamal is forging own path
summary: Lamine Yamal, an 18-year-old key figure in Spain's World Cup squad, is pushing back against comparisons to Lionel Messi while establishing his own identity as a player. The young talent's focus is on forging his unique career path rather than living in the shadow of a legend.
content: Lamine Yamal is a key figure in Spain's World Cup squad, but why is the 18-year-old quick to dismiss Messi comparisons?

zh.title: 一个不想成为梅西的少年：拉米内·亚马尔如何开创自己的道路
zh.summary: 18岁的拉米内·亚马尔是西班牙世界杯队伍的关键人物，他正在反驳与莱昂内尔·梅西的比较，同时建立自己作为球员的身份。这位年轻天才的焦点是开创自己独特的职业道路，而不是生活在传奇人物的阴影下。

title: Celtic star 'inspiring' next football generation
summary: A Celtic star's professional success is inspiring the next generation of footballers, with family, fans, and former coaches crediting the player's achievements with motivating young talent. The article highlights the broader positive impact of professional athletes on youth football development.
content: Family, fans and a former coach said Osmand's success at Celtic could help others in the island.

zh.title: 凯尔特人明星"激励"下一代足球运动员
zh.summary: 一位凯尔特人明星的职业成功激励了下一代足球运动员，家人、球迷和前教练都将这位球员的成就与激励年轻人才联系在一起。该文章强调了职业运动员对青年足球发展的广泛积极影响。

title: Liverpool's Koumas to prove worth after Wales goal
summary: Liverpool teenager Lewis Koumas is looking to establish his credentials in international football after helping Hull City earn promotion to the Premier League. The young player aims to prove his worth in a Wales shirt at the World Cup.
content: Liverpool teenager Lewis Koumas is determined to prove his worth in a Wales shirt having helped Hull City gain promotion into the Premier League.

zh.title: 利物浦库马斯威尔士进球后证明价值
zh.summary: 利物浦少年刘易斯·库马斯在帮助赫尔城获得英超升级后，寻求在国际足球中确立自己的资历。这位年轻球员希望在世界杯上穿着威尔士球衣证明自己的价值。

title: Wales diverted as weather hits Montenegro qualifier
summary: Wales' preparations for their Women's World Cup qualifier against Montenegro have been disrupted by severe weather, forcing the team to divert to Italy. The travel complications add unexpected challenges ahead of Friday's match.
content: Wales diverted to Italy as bad weather badly disrupts preparations for Friday's Women's World Cup qualifier in Montenegro.

zh.title: 威尔士因天气影响黑山预选赛而改道
zh.summary: 威尔士女足世界杯预选赛对黑山的准备工作因恶劣天气而中断，被迫改道前往意大利。旅行并发症在周五比赛前增加了意想不到的挑战。
